---
title: "001-k5model-liesel — HBMNL mixture fit"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
engine: jupyter
execute:
  timeout: 7200  # seconds; must exceed the slowest single fit (SLURM is the real wall-clock cap)
---

Fits ONE overspecified (K_MODEL = 5) hierarchical Bayesian mixture multinomial
logit model to one simulated dataset, with the sampler / chains / dataset chosen
by the `params.csv` row `JOB_ROW`. Writes tidy one-row-per-X summary CSVs to
`out/<type>/`. Vendored model + sampler + analysis code lives in `src/`.

CAPSLOCK variables are harness machinery — don't rename them.

## Parameters

```{python}
# | tags: [parameters]
JOB_DIR: str = "jobs/001-k5model-liesel"
JOB_ROW: int = 0
JOB_TESTING: bool = True
```

## Setup

```{python}
# | label: imports
import io
import json
import logging
import sys
import time
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

print("python:", sys.executable)
print("cwd   :", Path.cwd())
```

```{python}
# | label: load-params-row
JOB_PATH = Path(JOB_DIR)
PARAMS = pd.read_csv(JOB_PATH / "params.csv").iloc[JOB_ROW, :]
print(PARAMS)
```

```{python}
# | label: identifier
now = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d-%H%M")
JOB_IDENTIFIER = JOB_PATH.name + "-" + f"{JOB_ROW:04d}" + "-" + now
PARAMS["job"] = JOB_PATH.name
PARAMS["run"] = JOB_IDENTIFIER
```

```{python}
# | label: directories
DIR_LOG = JOB_PATH / "log"
DIR_OUT = JOB_PATH / "out"
DIR_FIN = JOB_PATH / "finished"
if JOB_TESTING:
    DIR_OUT = JOB_PATH / "out-test"
for d in (DIR_LOG, DIR_OUT, DIR_FIN):
    d.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

FINFILE = DIR_FIN / str(JOB_ROW)
if FINFILE.exists() and not JOB_TESTING:
    raise RuntimeError(
        f"Row {JOB_ROW} of '{JOB_PATH.name}' is already finished. Delete "
        f"{FINFILE} to re-run."
    )
```

```{python}
# | label: logger
formatter = logging.Formatter("%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s")
handler = logging.FileHandler(filename=DIR_LOG / f"run-{JOB_ROW:04d}.log")
handler.setFormatter(formatter)
logger = logging.getLogger(str(JOB_PATH.name))
logger.addHandler(handler)
logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
logger.info(f"Job started: {JOB_IDENTIFIER}")
```

## Model code

### Make vendored study code importable

`src/` (model, samplers, analysis, summaries) is resolved relative to the job
directory, so imports work both locally and inside the HPC node-local rundir.

```{python}
# | label: import-vendored
JOB_PATH_ABS = JOB_PATH.resolve()
if str(JOB_PATH_ABS) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(JOB_PATH_ABS))

import jax  # noqa: F401
import jax.numpy as jnp

from src.mixturemodel import build_mixture_hbmnl_model
from src.inference.nuts import run_nuts_inference_mixture_hbmnl
from src.inference.hmc import run_hmc_inference_mixture_hbmnl
from src.summaries import build_summaries

print("jax backend:", jax.default_backend())
```

### Extract run settings from the params row

```{python}
# | label: run-settings
dataset_key = str(PARAMS["dataset_key"])
k_model     = int(PARAMS["k_model"])
sampler     = str(PARAMS["sampler"])
n_chains    = int(PARAMS["n_chains"])
warmup      = int(PARAMS["warmup"])
posterior   = int(PARAMS["posterior"])
seed        = int(PARAMS["seed"])
a_mu        = float(PARAMS["a_mu"])
a_delta     = float(PARAMS["a_delta"])
dirichlet_a = float(PARAMS["dirichlet_a"])
num_integration_steps = int(PARAMS["num_integration_steps"])

# Testing shortcut: short MCMC so the whole pipeline runs quickly. Warmup must
# stay above goose's Stan-window minimum (init + term + base ~ 150).
if JOB_TESTING:
    warmup, posterior = 200, 100
    logger.info(f"JOB_TESTING: warmup={warmup}, posterior={posterior}")
```

### Load the dataset (with ground truth)

`data/in/` sits two levels above the job dir — true both locally and on the HPC
(where `template.sh.j2` symlinks `data` next to the rundir).

```{python}
# | label: load-data
DATA_DIR = JOB_PATH_ABS.parent.parent / "data" / "in" / "k5model_mixture"
data_path = DATA_DIR / f"{dataset_key}.json"
logger.info(f"Loading {data_path}")
with open(data_path) as f:
    raw = json.load(f)

P = int(raw["n_params"])
choice_data = {
    "X":        jnp.array(raw["X"]),
    "y":        jnp.array(raw["y"]),
    "unit_idx": jnp.array(raw["unit_idx"]),
    "Z":        jnp.array(raw["Z"]) if raw.get("Z") is not None else None,
    "n_params": P,
    "n_units":  int(raw["n_units"]),
    "n_demos":  int(raw.get("n_demos", 0)),
}
print(f"dataset={dataset_key}  K_true={raw['K']}  N={choice_data['n_units']}  P={P}")
print(f"sampler={sampler}  K_model={k_model}  chains={n_chains}  warmup={warmup}  posterior={posterior}")
```

### Build the model

```{python}
# | label: build-model
model = build_mixture_hbmnl_model(
    data_dict=choice_data, K=k_model,
    A_delta=a_delta, a_mu=a_mu, dirichlet_a=dirichlet_a,
)
```

### Run the sampler (capturing the goose log for error counts)

```{python}
# | label: sample
log_buffer = io.StringIO()
_gh = logging.StreamHandler(log_buffer)
_gh.setFormatter(formatter)
_liesel_logger = logging.getLogger("liesel")
_liesel_logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
_liesel_logger.addHandler(_gh)

t0 = time.time()
if sampler == "nuts":
    mcmc_results, posterior_samples = run_nuts_inference_mixture_hbmnl(
        model=model, data_dict=choice_data, K=k_model,
        chains=n_chains, warmup=warmup, posterior=posterior, seed=seed,
    )
elif sampler == "hmc":
    mcmc_results, posterior_samples = run_hmc_inference_mixture_hbmnl(
        model=model, data_dict=choice_data, K=k_model,
        num_integration_steps=num_integration_steps,
        chains=n_chains, warmup=warmup, posterior=posterior, seed=seed,
    )
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown sampler: {sampler}")
runtime_s = time.time() - t0

_liesel_logger.removeHandler(_gh)
sampling_log_text = log_buffer.getvalue()
logger.info(f"Sampling done in {runtime_s:.1f}s")
print(f"Sampling done in {runtime_s:.1f}s")
```

### Build the tidy summary tables

```{python}
# | label: summaries
cond = {
    "job": PARAMS["job"], "run": PARAMS["run"], "job_row": int(JOB_ROW),
    "dataset_key": dataset_key, "scenario": str(PARAMS.get("scenario", "")),
    "k_true": int(raw["K"]), "data_seed": int(PARAMS.get("data_seed", -1)),
    "k_model": k_model, "sampler": sampler, "n_chains": n_chains,
    "warmup": warmup, "posterior": posterior, "seed": seed,
    "a_mu": a_mu, "a_delta": a_delta, "dirichlet_a": dirichlet_a,
    "num_integration_steps": num_integration_steps if sampler == "hmc" else None,
}
tables = build_summaries(posterior_samples, raw, cond, runtime_s, sampling_log_text)
for name, df in tables.items():
    print(f"{name:14s} {df.shape}")
tables["diagnostics"]
```

## Save results

One tidy CSV per output type (gathered into `data/out/` later). The heavy
component-level posterior is kept on the HPC for optional deep-dive analysis.

```{python}
# | label: save-results
for name, df in tables.items():
    out_sub = DIR_OUT / name
    out_sub.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    df.to_csv(out_sub / f"{name}-row{JOB_ROW:04d}.csv", index=False)
    logger.info(f"wrote {name}-row{JOB_ROW:04d}.csv ({df.shape[0]} rows)")
```

```{python}
# | label: save-posterior
# Component-level draws (mu/sigma/std/pvec) only — NOT the per-unit beta_i bulk.
from src.analysis import export_posterior_to_pickle

post_name = f"{dataset_key}__k{k_model}_{sampler}_c{n_chains}.pkl"
try:
    export_posterior_to_pickle(
        samples=posterior_samples, K=k_model, P=P,
        filename=post_name, output_dir=str(DIR_OUT / "posterior"),
    )
except Exception as e:
    logger.warning(f"posterior export failed: {e}")
    print(f"posterior export failed: {e}")
```

## Mark job as finished

```{python}
# | label: mark-finished
if not JOB_TESTING:
    FINFILE.touch()
    logger.info("Marked finished.")
```
